title: Slyme's Boxy Font
description: A font with sharper corners and a retro feel.
body:
## A font for those who want one similar to Mojangles but sharper.
Boxy Font is a simple font for Minecraft that sharpens the corners on all\* of the letters

![A preview of the Boxy Font.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/waGxrDVo/images/a2719575e9b5ad9d1a40d2aae941e4e990038eab.png)

\* As of writing this, not all characters in `nonlatin_european.png` have been converted.
